headline: Tapestry Awarded U.S. Patent for Innovative AI Platform: Mira
summary: NEW YORK, May 11, 2026--Tapestry, Inc. (NYSE: TPR), a global house of iconic brands consisting of Coach and kate spade new york, has been awarded a U.S. patent for Mira, a proprietary AI platform designed to connect data across all areas of the company to enable rapid, enterprise-wide decision-making. The patent includes the core system architecture and marks Tapestry's first AI patent and second technology patent overall.
